sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect use of icacls to deny access for everyone in Users folder sometimes used to hide malicious files
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Use Icacls to Hide File to Everyone

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY External IP Address Lookup DNS Query (2ip .ua)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY External IP Address Lookup DNS Query (2ip .ua)"; dns.query; content:"2ip.ua"; nocase; endswith; reference:md5,81bfa5fe9d0147c8df47a51a1cd4b7c4; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2027026; rev:3; metadata:created_at 2019_03_04, former_category POLICY, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Minor, tag IP_address_lookup_website, updated_at 2020_09_16;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Observed External IP Lookup Domain (api .2ip .ua in TLS SNI)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Observed External IP Lookup Domain (api .2ip .ua in TLS SNI)"; flow:established,to_server; tls.sni; content:"api.2ip.ua"; bsize:10; fast_pattern; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2033214; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_07_01, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2021_07_01;)
